summary: As of 2026-05-14, MSTR is trading at a premium to the Bitcoin-backed NAV proxy, with premium to NAV at 7.44% and mNAV at 1.07x. Over the last 30 observations, the premium has widened by 24.00%, compared with an average premium of -1.98%. During the same window, BTC moved 21.17% while MSTR moved 56.03%.
